mapper.select: select id, user_id, book_id, favorited, followed, purchased, favorite_time, follow_time, purchase_price, order_no, pay_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, deleted from osh_user_book_relation where user_id = #{userId} and book_id = #{bookId} and deleted = 0

select b.id, b.title, b.cover, b.description from osh_user_book_relation ubr left join osh_book b on ubr.book_id = b.id where ubr.user_id = #{userId} and ubr.purchased = 1 and ubr.deleted = 0 and b.del_flag = '0' order by ubr.pay_time desc

select b.id, b.title, b.cover, b.description from osh_user_book_relation ubr left join osh_book b on ubr.book_id = b.id where ubr.user_id = #{userId} and ubr.purchased = 1 and ubr.deleted = 0 and b.del_flag = '0' order by ubr.pay_time desc
